content: Hi all, I just opened another PR with a bunch of things rebased/imported from rust onto rust-next as well as more DRM and related abstractions. This is not upstreamable as-is, but I hope it helps folks who want to work on top of upstream and also helps us figure out what the blockers are ^^

Right now it largely has the existing things from my previous PR as well as most of kernel::sync and the remaining DRM and DMA Fence abstractions. I'll add the platform device/OF/userptr stuff next, and hopefully that will get me fairly close to being able to rebase the GPU driver on top.

I'm also skipping sync::smutex as it doesn't participate in lockdep. There are only a few places where I need it in abstractions themselves, though the GPU driver uses a ton of mutexes so it would be nice to have the pin_init stuff figured out soon so we can make the initialization more ergonomic!
Nit: you can replace the commit title fromrust: kernel: submodule: title to rust: submodule: title;-)
